quality.clarity: High. The mechanics are clearly described, including charges, action economy, light radius, and the save DC.
quality.completeness: High. All necessary mechanical elements (charges, recharge, action cost, effect duration, light levels, attack disadvantage, saving throw, and condition) are present.
quality.formatting_notes: The description uses a hyperlink placeholder ('#stunned') which would need resolution in a complete system, but is acceptable in raw data representation.

mechanics.action_economy: Requires 1 action to activate, effect lasts until the end of the user's next turn (effectively 1 round).
mechanics.defensive_utility: Provides both passive defense (disadvantage on attacks) and active crowd control (stun).

save_difficulty.effect: Stunned condition for the duration of the light effect (until the end of the user's next turn).

mechanics.balance_assessment: Very Rare seems appropriate. The combination of imposing disadvantage and a potential short-duration stun (DC 15 Wisdom is challenging) for the cost of one action and one charge is potent, balanced by the limited charges.

llm_audit.final_assessment: Excellent quality data structure. The item is mechanically sound and clearly defined, suitable for direct integration into a game system database.
